summary: Use offset and limit when reading large files - never read the whole file if you only need a section
problem: Reading a 2000-line file to find a 10-line function wastes context and slows the turn
solution: Use the Read tool's offset and limit parameters, or use Grep first to find the line number, then read only that region with a 20-30 line window around it
root_cause: Large files read in full can consume thousands of context tokens for content you will never reference; targeted reads keep the window clean
